channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Thune Hits Breaking Point with Trump
item.description: John Thune's tone has shifted subtly but unmistakably, suggesting he has grown frustrated with President Trump, a development with significant implications.

item.title: Google proposes water standards in response to data center criticism
item.description: Amid growing concerns over data center water use, Google released guidelines it hopes will become industry standards.

item.title: Republican support for marriage equality and LGBTQ+ rights declines, poll finds
item.description: A Gallup survey shows Republican backing for marriage equality has dropped sharply, with fewer than 4 in 10 supporting it.

item.title: Lebanon vote sparks internal conflict among House Democrats
item.description: An upcoming House vote on limiting U.S. involvement in Israel's Lebanon war has caused friction among Democrats.
